parameters.subsql:
SELECT 
    s.user_id,
    s.name,
    s.username,
    DATE(s.date_join) AS date_join,
    DATE(s.date_left) AS date_left,
    s.invitelinks,
    z.invitelinks AS z_invitelinks,
    z.invitelinks_uae AS z_invitelinks_uae,
    z.invitelinks_msc AS z_invitelinks_msc,
    z.channel_name,
    z.channel_link,
    z.cost,
    z.followers_msc,
    z.followers_uae,
    z.post,
    z.date AS z_date  -- Дата закупки
FROM sheets_report_75096 s
LEFT JOIN zakupki z ON z.invitelinks = s.invitelinks
                   OR z.invitelinks_uae = s.invitelinks
                   OR z.invitelinks_msc = s.invitelinks

parameters.db_version: PostgreSQL 14.11 (Ubuntu 14.11-1.pgdg20.04+1) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Ubuntu 9.4.0-1ubuntu1~20.04.2) 9.4.0, 64-bit
